title: YO25 9RG, J.S.R. Genetics Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/TP3538KE/T005
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: J.S.R. Genetics Limited   Installation name: Decoy Pig Finishing Unit   Permit number: EPR/TP3538KE/T005   "
